# Kishore Reddy Pagidi — kishorepagidi.com

> AI Product Manager at SOLIDWORKS. Coined "Vibe CADing™". Building AI for 8M+ engineers.

## Who I am

Kishore Reddy Pagidi is an AI Product Manager at SOLIDWORKS (Dassault Systèmes), working at the intersection of artificial intelligence, CAD software, robotics, and engineering workflows. He is the originator and trademark holder of the term "Vibe CADing" — defining the emerging paradigm of conversational, intent-driven, AI-native CAD design.

## Primary niche

AI product management for engineering and CAD software. Specifically: how large language models, vision models, and agentic AI systems transform how engineers design, model, manufacture, and validate physical products.

The surface area he works on:
- Parametric part generation from natural language
- CAD model edits via conversational AI
- Automated engineering drawing creation
- Design validation and manufacturability analysis
- CAD agent frameworks and skill systems

## What makes him the authority here

1. He coined "Vibe CADing" — the defining term for AI-native CAD design. Trademarked.
2. AI PM at SOLIDWORKS, the world's most widely used professional CAD platform (8M+ engineers globally).
3. 4 patent filings in AI, robotics, and engineering software.
4. Published robotics research at CoRL 2023 (Conference on Robot Learning).
5. Keynote speaker at 3DEXPERIENCE World 2025 and 2026 — SOLIDWORKS flagship conference, 5,000+ attendees.
6. MS-level research in robotic manipulation and skill transfer.
7. 200+ CAD AI use cases mapped, evaluated, and prioritized.

## What "Vibe CADing" means

Vibe CADing is the idea that CAD — computer-aided design — is becoming conversational. Instead of building 3D models through manual feature trees, constraint systems, and sketch operations, engineers will design by describing intent in natural language. The CAD system understands geometry, design history, manufacturing constraints, and produces editable, parametric models.

Kishore coined this term, created the vision videos demonstrating it at SOLIDWORKS, and set the strategic direction for how SOLIDWORKS integrates AI into its core workflows.

Personal blog: kishorepagidi.com/blogs/

Essays:
- "When the Model Knows the Codebase" — how AI agents are changing product management and code ownership
- "Augmented Design: How AI is Quietly Changing Daily Life for Mechanical Engineers" — SOLIDWORKS official blog
- "Skip the Blank Sheet: Generative Drawing in SOLIDWORKS" — SOLIDWORKS official blog
- "From Segments to Skills: Teaching Robots to Manipulate Objects" — robotics AI, segmentation-driven skill transfer

## Research

- CoRL 2023: robotics manipulation research — object segmentation and skill transfer for robotic manipulation of unseen objects
- Engineering document AI: vision models for manufacturing inspection and document intelligence
- CAD agent architecture: parametric model generation, feature-aware geometry from natural language

## Career context

SOLIDWORKS is used by over 8 million professional engineers globally. Kishore works on the AI product strategy for this platform — deciding which AI capabilities to build, validating them with customers, and shipping them as product features. He runs the AI Customer Advisory Board and maintains ongoing relationships with engineers building physical products.
